text.tspan: u2022 High branching factor (often hundreds): a 4-level tree holds
u2022 ALL leaves at the same depth u2014 balanced (O(log n))
u2022 Reads, writes, range scans: O(log n) random page reads
u2022 Updates IN-PLACE (this is the key difference from LSM)
u2022 Pages typically 4u20138 KB u2014 matches OS/storage page size
